summary: The diff implements all three requirements from the build request. REQ-1 is covered by the full set of storefront pages (HomePage, StorePage, GalleryPage, CustomOrderPage, CheckoutPage, OrderSuccessPage) with cart persistence, payment proof upload, and backend queries. REQ-2 is covered by the AdminDashboard with Internet Identity gating, isCallerAdmin check, backend access control tied to lanepeevy@gmail.com, and four management tabs (Products, Orders, Gallery, Payments). REQ-3 is covered by the Layout component displaying the Creative Prints logo in a sticky header on every page. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
